name: Mark Warner
subject: the fight continues
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
we lost a brilliant legal mind, a true trailblazer, and a role model
|
---

| | Derek --

Last night, we lost a brilliant legal mind, a true trailblazer, and a role model for so many in this country. Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg was a giant -- someone who spent her life fighting for the most vulnerable among us and working toward true equality for everyone in this country. I am thinking of her family, and the many people who looked up to her and loved her, during this challenging time.

Justice Ginsburg is gone, but her legacy remains.

We see it here in Virginia, when we see women among the graduating classes at Virginia Military Institute. And we see it in all of the people who were inspired by Justice Ginsburg to continue her work of breaking down barriers to make way for a more just society.

Justice Ginsburg said that some of her favorite opinions to write were dissenting opinions. In a way, she has left us our to-do list in her dissenting opinions: fix the Voting Rights Act, close the pay gap in our country, and ensure that people are able to make reproductive health decisions for themselves.

Shortly before her death, Justice Ginsburg said it was her fervent wish that a new Supreme Court Justice not be confirmed until a new President was elected. It is my desire to honor that wish as part of honoring who Justice Ginsburg was and what she meant to this country.

As we look at our path forward, it's clear that this election will be about who we are -- and who we want to be -- as a nation, and about preserving the progress we've made to make this country more fair and equal for all. And it will be about charting our path forward, because there is certainly still work to be done.

May her memory be a blessing and a call to action for all of us.
|
---
-- Mark Warner

President Trump asked us to personally reach out to you because he REALLY wants YOU to be his VIP guest for an upcoming Presidential Debate. This is the LAST DAY to contribute to win an EXCLUSIVE, VIP ACCESS trip to attend a debate between the President and Joe Biden. There are only a few hours left to enter and if you contribute any amount RIGHT NOW, you’ll automatically be entered TWICE. Please contribute ANY AMOUNT RIGHT NOW and you will be automatically entered TWICE to win a trip to an upcoming Presidential Debate. >> DOUBLE-ENTRY: ACTIVATED CONTRIBUTE $20 CONTRIBUTE $15 CONTRIBUTE $10 CONTRIBUTE $5 CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT Remember, if you win, not only will you get to bring a guest of your choice, but we’ll also cover your flights and hotel, AND you’ll get VIP access. Thank you, Team Trump 2020 CONTRIBUTE $5 Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, CONTRIBUTION, OR TEXT MESSAGE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN. Contributing or sending a text message will not improve your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. You may enter by contributing to Trump Make America Great Again by clicking here. Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking here or by texting “DEBATE” to 88022 & 80810 for one (1) entry. By sending a text message from your mobile phone , you are providing your written consent to receive calls and SMS/MMS messages, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from each of the participating committees in the Trump Make America Great Again Committee, Donald J. Trump for President Inc. and the Republican National Committee. Text message and data rates may apply. Consent is not required as a condition of entry. Text STOP to 88022 and 80810 to opt-out. Entries must be received between September 1, 2020, at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time and ends on September 24, 2020 at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) winner will receive round-trip transportation and accommodations for two (2) and receive a photo opportunity with President Donald J. Trump to be identified by Sponsor (approximate retail value $3000). The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winner must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit here for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 725 Fifth Ave, New York, NY 10022

name: Teresa Tomlinson
subject: Friends, we have to fight this for RBG.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by GBP, www
body:
georgiablueproject.com [georgiablueproject.com]Friends,
Last night we faced a terrible loss as a paragon of justice and a champion of the people passed away. Ruth Bader Ginsburg was an inspiration to us all, not just as one of the fairest justices on the Supreme Court, but as a genuine person who was a true friend of the American people. She was truly the best of us.
Justice Ginsburg said that it was her fervent wish that a new Justice would not be appointed to the Supreme Court until a new president is installed. The president and his enabler Mitch McConnell have already made it crystal clear that, in a hypocritical move, they will attempt to push through a new Justice during a lame-duck session. This shows just how scared they are of what will happen in November, and of losing the ability to skew the Supreme Court hard-right for decades to come.
Friends, I say let’s make their nightmare a reality.
In Georgia, we have the power to flip two influential seats in the U.S. Senate. Two senate seats to save the Supreme Court for decades to come.
Our work will help flip them. Will you donate whatever you can today to help Georgia Blue Project reach voters and increase turnout up and down the ballot in November? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gbp-1#edit?refcode=91420] Friends, the demographic data shows that Georgia is already Blue. Part of Georgia Blue’s entire mission is to get target voters to vote Democratic so that November’s results up and down the ballot are undeniable. The power lies in the voters’ hands. In your hands. Let’s fight for Justice Ginsberg’s legacy just as she fought for America’s legacy. Let’s flip Georgia Blue.
Yours Truly,
Teresa Tomlinson
GeorgiaBlueProject.com
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gbp-1#edit?refcode=91420]

Paid for by GBP, www.georgiablueproject.com, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

Georgia Blue PRoject
PO Box 60558
Philadelphia, PA 19145
United States

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: If Trump replaces RBG, Congress must expand the Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
We cannot tie our hands with antiquated norms that the Republican Party has long since abandoned.
#

_Since he launched his campaign, Mondaire has been a leader in the conversations surrounding democracy reform and the need to rebalance the Supreme Court. Following the tragic death of Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg, Mondaire published an op-ed, included below, reiterating his call to expand the Supreme Court if Republicans ram an appointment through before the American people have a chance to choose their next President. Bold action will be necessary to save the judiciary and the future of our country._
_**[If you agree with Mondaire and want to join in our fight, please make a donation to our campaign today to help elect him to Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19342708/252735300/-1084116692?refcode2=6dfe8b9a-59fb-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&refcode=em200920-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZGZlOGI5YS01OWZiLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y9TGTlx13bM2HuvfxBTAZGxvfqQfo65QtsJJbR1xlmE=)**_
* * *
**If Trump Replaces RBG, Congress Must Expand the Court**
On February 13, 2016, Supreme Court Justice Antonin Scalia passed away.
President Obama did what every President has done following a Supreme Court vacancy: he nominated a replacement, the eminently qualified Judge Merrick Garland of the D.C. Circuit Court of Appeals.
President Obama expected the Senate to do what it had done for every one of the 160 nominees to the Supreme Court before Judge Garland: hold hearings and deliberate on his fitness for the Supreme Court.
But Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell had other plans.
Just one hour after Justice Scalia’s death, McConnell vowed that the Senate would not even consider a replacement nominated by President Obama.
"The American people should have a voice in the selection of their next Supreme Court Justice,” McConnell said at the time. “Therefore, this vacancy should not be filled until we have a new President."
At his bidding, the Republican-controlled Senate broke with centuries of precedent and refused to grant Judge Garland so much as a hearing.
That was 269 days before Election Day.
On Friday night, Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg passed away — just 46 days before the November 3rd Presidential Election.
Mitch McConnell has already promised to disregard his own precedent and ram through a replacement of Justice Ginsburg before the November election. That should confirm for the American people what many of us already knew: the Republican Party sees the Supreme Court as a partisan tool meant to serve its own political ends and further entrench the power of right-wing plutocrats.
**If Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump ram through someone from Trump’s horrifying shortlist during this legislative session, the next Congress must respond by expanding the Supreme Court.**
We cannot tie our hands with antiquated norms that the Republican Party has long since abandoned. We have too much to lose. A more equitable and just America — one with economic fairness, a Green New Deal, Medicare for All, reproductive justice, workers’ rights, LGBTQ equality, racial justice, and an inclusive democracy — hangs in the balance.
As America’s white supremacist President tries to install a 6-3 partisan, conservative majority on the Supreme Court, we cannot be immobile. We must fight. And Congress must do its part.
Congress’ power to act is as clear as day. Article III of the Constitution unambiguously grants the legislative branch the authority to adjust the composition of the judiciary, including the number of seats on the Supreme Court. In fact, Congress has already done this seven times in our nation’s history. In the next Congress, which I expect to join, my colleagues and I must be prepared to fight for the American people as doggedly as the GOP is fighting for the special interests and big corporations it represents. We must expand the Supreme Court to 13 seats, and allow President Biden to fill those vacancies.
If we sit back and watch as another seat on the Supreme Court is stolen from us, we resign ourselves to a generation’s worth of defeat at the hands of six people installed by a right-wing, minoritarian government. We owe it to ourselves and to the American people to fight that looming doomsday scenario with every tool at our disposal.

name: Allen Chen
subject: another campaign email - 44 days to go
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Friend,

We’ve seen an outpouring of support to keep us on the air and fight back against our opponent and his taste for expensive private fundraisers with Kevin McCarthy -- and for that, I’m personally grateful.

That support proves two things, friend.

First, it shows us that people are tired of the back-door deals and DC interests dominating our politics. They want someone who can be held accountable to the people, and they want big money out of our politics.

And second, it shows us that people can see through the division that has defined our opponent’s campaign -- we’re ready for real change.

Sri’s running for Congress to deliver that change and ensure that our representatives fight for all of us, not DC interests and the divisive politics that keep them in power. And if you’re ready to join him in that fight, we need you now more than ever.

Chip in now: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.20_b1_a_all&amount=25

There are 44 days left in this campaign, friend. Let’s make every day count.

Thanks,
Allen

Can you make it weekly?

Friend -- we’re just 7 weeks away from Election Day, and every dollar that comes through the door is immediately going back out to help us flip this seat. Your grassroots donations have put us on the path to victory, but now we need you to double down.
Can you commit to a $5 or more weekly donation between now and November 3rd? Even $5 goes a long way!

MAKE IT WEEKLY ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.20_b1_a_all&amount=25&amount=5&recurring=1

Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington.

Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.20_b1_a_all&amount=25

Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at https://sri2020.com/

Paid for by Sri for Congress

SRI FOR CONGRESS
P.O. BOX 898
SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 [#]

| Dear Friend,

In 2009, Mayor Annise Parker made history when she was the first LGBTQ person to be elected mayor of a major American city. She is also the first former elected official to lead Victory Fund.

On Wednesday, Sept. 23, Drs. Marsha and Warren Holleman and I will be hosting special guest, Mayor Annise Parker, for an engaging Zoom fundraising event. We look forward to having you join us for a conversation about this critical moment in our nation's history, SCOTUS, our national response to the Covid-19 pandemic, and improving healthcare in our country. I believe that healthcare is a right, not a privilege, and look forward to discussing how we can honor, improve, and protect that right for all people.

Guests will have the opportunity to ask questions during the virtual discussion. I would love for you to join us.

name: DonaldJTrump.com
subject: Make no mistake.

name: Mark Warner for Virginia
subject: A campaign for every Virginian.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Mark Warner has support all over the Commonwealth!
|
---

| | Derek,

**This is a grassroots campaign.** It always has been. And as you can see, Mark Warner has support coming from every corner of the Commonwealth. | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85daa0/53d9897e/55e29a69/1c8812bd/1596954865/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc5NCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-map?refcode=20200920_f_1_nd__794__&refcode2=graphic&amount=5")
---
**[Can you add Manassas to our map by making a donation today?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85daa0/53d9897e/55e29a69/1c8812bc/1596954865/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc5NCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-map?refcode=20200920_f_1_nd__794__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**
**With just 44 days until the election on November 3rd, we can 't afford to let Mark's momentum slow. **

Mark won his 2014 election by less than 1% -- our team is not taking anything for granted in this campaign. From the very beginning, Mark wanted to run a campaign for every Virginian, and widespread support for his campaign from across the Commonwealth is proof that folks know he's working hard for _every_ Virginian.

**[Derek, will we see your name on the map next?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85daa0/53d9897e/55e29a69/1c8812bb/1596954865/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijc5NCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-map?refcode=20200920_f_1_nd__794__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**

Thank you for being a key part of this campaign.

-- Team Warner

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Ruth Bader Ginsburg
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hello,
Friday, we lost a titan and a true champion for justice.
A trailblazer with an unmatched legal mind, Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg fought -- and won -- countless fights for women's equality. On the Court, she was a powerful voice for justice, whether in the majority or in dissent. Her advocacy, her spirit, and her service opened doors for women and girls across the country. For that, I will always be grateful.
I went to bed on Friday with a shattered heart and a broken spirit. But yesterday, I woke with a sense of determination and a renewed drive to honor Justice Ginsburg's legacy.
The fights that lie ahead of us are going to be tough. The best way -- the only way -- to persevere is by facing the future with the same courage and determination that Justice Ginsburg embodied for each of her 87 years.
The weeks in front of us are going to be some of the most consequential in our country's history, and I hope that you find comfort and strength for the road ahead.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
> [Contribute](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc51f/2a380d31/20f45bf1/f0bd2f/4086680865/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMDkyMF9SQkdfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwIn0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20200920_RBG_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

_ _
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc51f/2a380d31/20f45bf1/f0bd28/4086680865/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH
Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.
Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States

body:
Rick reached out on Friday to tell you about our anti-dark money fundraising drive. We’re pleased to see our team step up, chip in, and help defeat Pete Sessions in November:

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19346846/252753646/338717222?refcode=fl_email_fr_20200920midmonth2_KFT_all_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjBhZmYyYS02YmZiLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-xUX6JTc7mx8Ulc6oyLP1nkL0_Un6wnzGHU6DVRcsxk=)
---

Alright, team -- Rick reached out on Friday to tell you about our anti-dark money fundraising drive. **We’re pleased to see our team step up,[_chip in_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19346847/252753647/-1714023214?refcode=fl_email_fr_20200920midmonth2_KFT_all_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjBhZmYyYS02YmZiLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-xUX6JTc7mx8Ulc6oyLP1nkL0_Un6wnzGHU6DVRcsxk=), and help defeat Pete Sessions in November:** __In fact, we raised $3,267 on the first day alone.__ But, Sessions' cozy relationship with big donors and special interests means he can call in a lot of favors. [_**Can you help us prepare for a possible onslaught of outside, dark money spending? A donation of any amount gets us one step closer to our goal.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19346848/252753648/338717222?refcode=fl_email_fr_20200920midmonth2_KFT_all_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjBhZmYyYS02YmZiLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-xUX6JTc7mx8Ulc6oyLP1nkL0_Un6wnzGHU6DVRcsxk=) Sessions is exceptionally unpopular in our district. It’s clear his shameful reputation as a self-serving, possibly corrupt politician is following him after losing his Congressional seat in Dallas in 2018. name: Georgia HQ - Jon Ossoff for Senate
subject: Re: The Election is here!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
Voting in Georgia starts in a matter of days |
---
Friend -- We're sure you get emails and read articles counting down the days until Election Day. (It's 44 days from today!)

_But we don't have those full 44 days, not really.**November 3 is just the last day of voting this year.**_

**Because voting in Georgia starts in a matter of DAYS, when the first batch of absentee ballots arrive in Georgia voters' mailboxes.**

**As Jon said the other day, the Election is here, and we need to be at maximum strength. Now, more than ever, we need a Democratic Senate, and that starts in Georgia.[With only a few more weeks to get our message out, can you make a donation TODAY to make sure we reach every Georgia voter and turn Jon's momentum into a victory?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e28b7/5b2c1286/3a0197b0/25f3d750/1143836015/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_17_jon_absnt?refcode=em_2020_09_19_jon_absnt_ng_k")**

**\-------- Begin Forwarded Message ---------**

**From:** Jon Ossoff (personal)
**To:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Date:** September 17, 2020
**Subject:** The Election is here!

**Friend -- Georgia's first absentee ballots are sent out THIS WEEK.**
**_THE ELECTION IS HERE._**
Georgia voters are NOW beginning to get their absentee ballots. Many, many, many will vote well before November 3.

There's no time to lose. We need to be at maximum strength right now!

_I'm leading in the latest polling, and Mitch McConnell's super PAC has spent more against me than any other Democrat in America._

**[Can you rush a $20 donation right now to keep our momentum surging?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e28b7/5b2c1286/3a0197b0/25f3d756/1143836015/VEsB/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_17_jon_absnt?refcode=em_2020_09_19_jon_absnt_ng_k&amount=20")**

Here's the bottom line: _We only have**a few more weeks** to get our message out!_

Voting HAS BEGUN, and we need to be reaching every voter in Georgia -- RIGHT NOW.

Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg was one of the most revered legal minds in this country. The second woman to ever sit on the Supreme Court, she fought tirelessly for the rights of her fellow Americans. This is a time of mourning for all our country has lost with Justice Ginsburg. But it must also be a time for action. We can pray for change, but we also have to work for it. **Flipping**** the United States Senate and regaining a Democratic majority has never been more urgent.** Democrats must invest in our Senate races like never before — especially grassroots campaigns like ours that Democratic Party elites have ignored. And let’s just be clear: **The path to a Senate majority runs through Mississippi.** We are only 5 points down. Mississippi is a battleground state — no matter what pundits may say.

Sarbanes](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19351043/252772807/1858334150?refcode=092020-es-ecu-event-rsvp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzZkNmYxZi04MGZiLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zY5-ktLSF0ytRrbH0ho8vG6lS4blzI3VZ1YgW6JTmNw=&emci=a341db54-52fb-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emdi=336d6f1f-80fb-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644)** , hosted by End Citizens United and Let America Vote, this Monday at 7:00 PM ET!

Rep. John Sarbanes, author of H.R. 1, the most expansive democracy reform and anti-corruption legislation since Watergate, will be joining Margaret to discuss how we get big money out of politics, so that our democracy works for the people — not corporate special interests.
**[Click here to RSVP and join us for this can’t-miss, free virtual event.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19351044/252772808/1858334150?refcode=092020-es-ecu-event-rsvp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzZkNmYxZi04MGZiLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zY5-ktLSF0ytRrbH0ho8vG6lS4blzI3VZ1YgW6JTmNw=&emci=a341db54-52fb-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emdi=336d6f1f-80fb-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19351045/252772809/1858334150?refcode=092020-es-ecu-event-rsvp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzZkNmYxZi04MGZiLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zY5-ktLSF0ytRrbH0ho8vG6lS4blzI3VZ1YgW6JTmNw=&emci=a341db54-52fb-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emdi=336d6f1f-80fb-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644)
[RSVP »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19351046/252772810/1858334150?refcode=092020-es-ecu-event-rsvp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMzZkNmYxZi04MGZiLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zY5-ktLSF0ytRrbH0ho8vG6lS4blzI3VZ1YgW6JTmNw=&emci=a341db54-52fb-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emdi=336d6f1f-80fb-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644)
Margaret does not take a dime from corporate PACs, unlike her opponent, and knows how important it is to get big money out of politics — that’s why Rep. Sarbanes is so excited to join her on Monday evening for this critical discussion about the future of our democracy.

We hope you can attend this free virtual event.

Good for Congress

Margaret Good for Congress
PO Box 5073
Sarasota, FL 34277
United States
Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us.
Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us. Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our campaign has taken a pledge to reject corporate PAC money and is instead funded by thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our community and across our country. = If you’d like to volunteer, If you’d like to unsubscribe, we hate to see you go, but click here to .

name: Teresa Tomlinson
subject: Friends, we have to fight this for RBG.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by GBP, www
body:
georgiablueproject.com [georgiablueproject.com]Friends,
Friday night we faced a terrible loss as a paragon of justice and a champion of the people passed away. Ruth Bader Ginsburg was an inspiration to us all, not just as one of the fairest justices on the Supreme Court, but as a genuine person who was a true friend of the American people. She was truly the best of us.
Justice Ginsburg said that it was her fervent wish that a new Justice would not be appointed to the Supreme Court until a new president is installed. The president and his enabler Mitch McConnell have already made it crystal clear that, in a hypocritical move, they will attempt to push through a new Justice during a lame-duck session. This shows just how scared they are of what will happen in November, and of losing the ability to skew the Supreme Court hard-right for decades to come.
Friends, I say let’s make their nightmare a reality.
In Georgia, we have the power to flip two influential seats in the U.S. Senate. Two senate seats to save the Supreme Court for decades to come.
Our work will help flip them. Will you donate whatever you can today to help Georgia Blue Project reach voters and increase turnout up and down the ballot in November? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/gbp-1#edit?refcode=91420]
Friends, the demographic data shows that Georgia is already Blue. Part of Georgia Blue’s entire mission is to get target voters to vote Democratic so that November’s results up and down the ballot are undeniable. The power lies in the voters’ hands. In your hands. Let’s fight for Justice Ginsberg’s legacy just as she fought for America’s legacy. Let’s flip Georgia Blue.
Yours Truly,
Teresa Tomlinson
GeorgiaBlueProject.com
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gbp-1#edit?refcode=91420]
https://www.facebook.com/georgiablueproject [https://www.facebook.com/georgiablueproject] https://twitter.com/gablueproject [https://twitter.com/gablueproject] https://www.instagram.com/gablueproject/ [https://www.instagram.com/gablueproject/]

Paid for by GBP, www.georgiablueproject.com, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

Georgia Blue PRoject
PO Box 60558
Philadelphia, PA 19145
United States

name: Eugene, you (2)
subject: Making sure you didn’t miss this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
With just six weeks until Election Day, the ability to hear directly from you about what matters most in this election means the world to me.
Friend,

I wanted to make sure you had the opportunity to take our September Survey. **With just six weeks until Election Day, the ability to hear directly from you about what matters most in this election means the world to me.**

The surveys, polls, and petitions we send offer a direct line to share your perspective with our campaign. It’s important to me to hear about the values you want to see in a public servant and the issues you’d like to see your next representative focus on.

[**If you have a moment to spare, will you take our September Survey and let me know what’s on your mind in this final stretch of the election?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19352487/252778450/-639101712?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDY3ZTFkYS04OGZiLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwM2FhMWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i1cPSQ6KyHgqlgKCDZM9WHzA-ypqKMWIbX9ETUeec9o=&emci=e8dfdb4a-5dfb-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emdi=0d67e1da-88fb-ea11-99c3-00155d03aa1f&ceid=10203249) | [Take the survey »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19352488/252778451/-639101712?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDY3ZTFkYS04OGZiLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwM2FhMWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i1cPSQ6KyHgqlgKCDZM9WHzA-ypqKMWIbX9ETUeec9o=&emci=e8dfdb4a-5dfb-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emdi=0d67e1da-88fb-ea11-99c3-00155d03aa1f&ceid=10203249)
---
Thank you,

Eugene
On Wed, Sep 9, 2020 at 12:50 PM DePasquale HQ wrote: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19352489/252778452/1819641719?refcode=em_surv_2020.09.20_b1_ey2_all-nd&refcode2=0d67e1da-88fb-ea11-99c3-00155d03aa1f&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDY3ZTFkYS04OGZiLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwM2FhMWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i1cPSQ6KyHgqlgKCDZM9WHzA-ypqKMWIbX9ETUeec9o=)
We are in the home stretch, team!

In less than eight weeks, all of the hard work and dedication of this grassroots team will come to a head, and we’re doing everything we can to make sure we flip this seat blue. **With our race in full swing, we wanted to take a moment today to see what's on your mind in these final weeks.**

[**Will you take our September Survey and let us know what is most important to you and your family in the final weeks of this election?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19352490/252778453/-639101712?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDY3ZTFkYS04OGZiLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwM2FhMWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i1cPSQ6KyHgqlgKCDZM9WHzA-ypqKMWIbX9ETUeec9o=&emci=e8dfdb4a-5dfb-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emdi=0d67e1da-88fb-ea11-99c3-00155d03aa1f&ceid=10203249) [Take the survey »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19352491/252778454/-639101712?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDY3ZTFkYS04OGZiLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwM2FhMWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i1cPSQ6KyHgqlgKCDZM9WHzA-ypqKMWIbX9ETUeec9o=&emci=e8dfdb4a-5dfb-ea11-99c3-00155d039e74&emdi=0d67e1da-88fb-ea11-99c3-00155d03aa1f&ceid=10203249)
---

Team, by taking our surveys, signing our petitions, volunteering, and [**making grassroots contributions**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/19352492/252778455/1819641719?refcode=em_surv_2020.09.20_b1_ey2_all-nd&refcode2=0d67e1da-88fb-ea11-99c3-00155d03aa1f&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDY3ZTFkYS04OGZiLWVhMTEtOTljMy0wMDE1NWQwM2FhMWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i1cPSQ6KyHgqlgKCDZM9WHzA-ypqKMWIbX9ETUeec9o=), you have helped define who we are as a campaign and what we can accomplish through Election Day.

And in these last few weeks, we’re dedicated to ensuring that your voice stays front and center in all we do. That commitment goes further than just our campaign -- it’s also who Eugene is as a leader. **In Congress, you can trust that he will always put the needs and interests of his community first.**

name: MAGASOTA
subject: AMAZING MAGASOTA TRUMP RALLY
body:
|

Yesterday we were blessed by God with beautiful weather and over 1300 beautiful Trump supporters. MAGASOTA hosted the most amazing Trump rally honoring our great President Donald J Trump. **Yesterday was 45 days from re electing our 45th president!** **** We had an exceptional lineup of speakers. **Michael J Matt from the Remnant TV and**** _Remnant Newpaper_****was our featured guest speaker.** **** He delivered such a power message. _He brought down the house!_ I would like you to start following him. [**https://www.youtube.com/user/TheRemnantvideo**](https://www.magasota.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwN_hTgIyLQEv-swRG6Ejl4xjZfezINsnyC5r92pCCVrkA&e=ae7c075f3228267010e570c56948845c&utm_source=magasota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=amazing_magasota_trump_rally&n=1) We had a surprise guest. _Katie Hopkins from the UK just happened to be in town so she popped in and gave us a rousing call to action to get busy and work for President Trump!_ __ If you were able to attend the event I thank you. If you weren’t able to attend I’m sorry you missed it. __ We had 200 MAGA hats and 45 KAG flags handed out and over 500 pieces of MAGASOTA gear. While we all had a great time the driving message of the day was this: **_We must spend the next 45 days working urgently to deliver a win for President Trump in Minnesota._** Friend MAGASOTA still needs financial support to cover expenses from this great rally and to continue to put literature into the hands of our door to door team members. Would you please consider a generous donation to help deliver Minnesota to President Trump? [www.magasota.com/contribute](http://www.magasota.com/contribute?e=ae7c075f3228267010e570c56948845c&utm_source=magasota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=amazing_magasota_trump_rally&n=2) 45 days isn’t a long time but we can get a lot of ground covered in that short time if everyone pitches in. **_Would you please consider helping?_ President Trump needs to win by an indisputable landslide and Minnesota has to be one of those states. ** Please enjoy some of our pictures. You can find hundreds of photos on our Facebook page. __ Checks may also be sent to MAGASOTA 19600 Foxfield Drive Prior Lake MN 55372 Thank you for your generosity! -Michele Even

MAGASOTA
[http://www.magasota.com/](http://www.magasota.com/?e=ae7c075f3228267010e570c56948845c&utm_source=magasota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=amazing_magasota_trump_rally&n=3)
---

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Weekend Recap: First week of school, extended unemployment, and the last days of the Census
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
There's a lot going on these days, and it's easy to miss things. That's why I wanted to put together a quick recap for you of the new announcements from the past week.
If you know someone who wants to stay up-to-date on the latest measures Rhode Island is taking to stop the spread of COVID-19, send them this link: [lp.constantcontactpages.com/su/eYMG9tf](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fVgu-oiQ2GsmMKaDjgQjjoRwLpJUNRpzInNHPxnE8kFwwYogOKN3r-VYwPu7WiTXtEwDFPX6c3laGS0C7bE3yFK2XGrxiPFpFY-73XGKIY4OflvegTFpB6zxcH4eUOtodRsKHO7Pgb2PrqMdYbvu4NBcg6m32q9v1YvxzH64LyokG_MGunXNjoyjV9FgcvmD-tKGE531Nw9oiBriTaFrD5x49PAggGIqrIMaxjHC9y6lExXjDVZf0mOkfnCvXVCt3Fh1JTtV0No55DLvglWv4qSwyt_NszqZbRCIhOFv30vrzjIS_6ykIu5t9-KN970NwBVKC0xYYwM=&c=YQGRYpIvH9r5331pb7fhPDzTKBVzDGQYxXofvAZnwc5k5I9YTUVtYg==&ch=Rh-_JQpphG6009jJFw9RvK0PK45BOpdvZPDbsnZmxhsTrB_V9Ldazw==). The better we all stay informed, the better we'll be able to keep ourselves, our families, and our friends safe from COVID-19.
---
| | |
---|---
|
BACK TO SCHOOL
Monday was a big day in Rhode Island - students and teachers headed back to school. I know the first day looked different this year than it has in years past, but I want you to know that we're ready to make this year successful. As I've said from the very beginning: we owe it to our kids to get them safely back into the classroom. And this week, the months of hard work paid off.

As a reminder, if you work at a school and you need a test, or if your child needs a test, you can schedule a same-day test by calling our dedicated PreK-12 COVID Test Scheduling Service at (844) 857-1814. The service is available seven days a week, from 7:30 a.m. to 9:30 p.m. This scheduling line is reserved for students, teachers, and staff who have symptoms, or who have been in close contact of someone who is positive.
| | |
---|---
|
EXPANDED UNEMPLOYMENT BENEFITS

I'm excited to announce that we have successfully lobbied the federal government for an additional three weeks of support. The Department of Labor and Training will be distributing an additional $300 per week to those who certified for unemployment benefits for the weeks ending August 22, August 29, and September 5. If you certified for unemployment during those three weeks, the money will be automatically deposited into your account. The first $600 will be deposited by early next week, and the final $300 will be deposited within a week after that. If you're currently without a job, I hope that this additional aid will help you make ends meet while we work to create opportunities for you.
| | |
---|---
|
2020 CENSUS

Census funding supports education, housing, healthcare, infrastructure and so much more.
We need you to stand and be counted in order to ensure that Rhode Island receives the funds it needs for you, your family, and your neighbors. Together, we all need to make one last push to complete our census. I know that there's a lot going on these days, but taking 10 minutes to fill out the census will make a difference in Rhode Island for the next 10 years. Please, go to [2020Census.gov](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fVgu-oiQ2GsmMKaDjgQjjoRwLpJUNRpzInNHPxnE8kFwwYogOKN3r_-QMhXGPWcmdWD-ldJcKpiDVAmw4gjdcR0DEhZE7I9VlMMg7qGE7CLoNOFZXmoceV_aGXz9sx2NyVDErfa-uC4=&c=YQGRYpIvH9r5331pb7fhPDzTKBVzDGQYxXofvAZnwc5k5I9YTUVtYg==&ch=Rh-_JQpphG6009jJFw9RvK0PK45BOpdvZPDbsnZmxhsTrB_V9Ldazw==) and fill our your census -- and make sure your friends and family do, too.
| I hope you find this recap helpful. It's so important that everyone stay engaged and informed so that we can all stay safe and healthy. I'll be back on TV with more updates Wednesday at 1 p.m.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor

clean_body: Your RI COVID-19 News Update | | | | | | | Hello friend, There's a lot going on these days, and it's easy to miss things. That's why I wanted to put together a quick recap for you of the new announcements from the past week. If you know someone who wants to stay up-to-date on the latest measures Rhode Island is taking to stop the spread of COVID-19, send them this link: ==. The better we all stay informed, the better we'll be able to keep ourselves, our families, and our friends safe from COVID-19. | | | ---|--- | BACK TO SCHOOL Monday was a big day in Rhode Island - students and teachers headed back to school. I know the first day looked different this year than it has in years past, but I want you to know that we're ready to make this year successful. As I've said from the very beginning: we owe it to our kids to get them safely back into the classroom. And this week, the months of hard work paid off. As a reminder, if you work at a school and you need a test, or if your child needs a test, you can schedule a same-day test by calling our dedicated PreK-12 COVID Test Scheduling Service at (844) 857-1814. The service is available seven days a week, from 7:30 a.m. to 9:30 p.m. This scheduling line is reserved for students, teachers, and staff who have symptoms, or who have been in close contact of someone who is positive. | | | ---|--- | EXPANDED UNEMPLOYMENT BENEFITS I'm excited to announce that we have successfully lobbied the federal government for an additional three weeks of support. The Department of Labor and Training will be distributing an additional $300 per week to those who certified for unemployment benefits for the weeks ending August 22, August 29, and September 5. If you certified for unemployment during those three weeks, the money will be automatically deposited into your account. The first $600 will be deposited by early next week, and the final $300 will be deposited within a week after that. If you're currently without a job, I hope that this additional aid will help you make ends meet while we work to create opportunities for you. | | | ---|--- | 2020 CENSUS Census funding supports education, housing, healthcare, infrastructure and so much more. We need you to stand and be counted in order to ensure that Rhode Island receives the funds it needs for you, your family, and your neighbors. Together, we all need to make one last push to complete our census. subject: You're Invited: Please join me and Mayor Annise Parker for a timely conversation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
We'll be taking questions from our guests during the virtual discussion on Zoom. | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=cc3862f480&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=c126daa686&e=5886ca081d)
---
| Dear Friend,

In 2009, Mayor Annise Parker made history when she was the first LGBTQ person to be elected mayor of a major American city. She is also the first former elected official to lead Victory Fund.

On Wednesday, Sept. 23, Drs. Marsha and Warren Holleman and I will be hosting special guest, Mayor Annise Parker, for an engaging Zoom fundraising event. We look forward to having you join us for a conversation about this critical moment in our nation's history, SCOTUS, our national response to the Covid-19 pandemic, and improving healthcare in our country. I believe that healthcare is a right, not a privilege, and look forward to discussing how we can honor, improve, and protect that right for all people.

Guests will have the opportunity to ask questions during the virtual discussion. I would love for you to join us.
---

Pat

name: Mark Warner Campaign HQ
subject: drug companies have gotten away with too much for too long
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Derek --

In Mark Warner's new TV ad, he takes on drug companies that keep jacking up the price of prescription drugs like insulin. | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85daa9/53d9897e/559c88df/1c881294/2573123563/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgwMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-drugcompanies-yt?refcode=20200920_f_1_nd__800__&refcode2=graphic&amount=5")
---
**[Watch Mark's new ad and, if you can, help us keep it on the air around the Commonwealth.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85daa9/53d9897e/559c88df/1c881293/2573123563/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgwMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-drugcompanies-yt?refcode=20200920_f_1_nd__800__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**
**This is a deeply personal issue for Mark.** His daughter was diagnosed with juvenile diabetes at the age of nine. Mark knows that far too many Virginian families are struggling just to buy lifesaving drugs -- like insulin -- for their own kids.

That's wrong. As Mark says in the ad:
"Drug companies have gotten away with too much for too long. I will continue to work to make affordable health care a reality for all Virginia families." -- Mark Warner
---
In the Senate, Mark has introduced legislation to get runaway prescription drug costs under control and to finally allow the government to negotiate for lower prescription drug prices.

We need to get this message out to as many Virginians as possible from now until Election Day. Since early voting has already started in Virginia, there's no time to waste.

**[If Mark's ad resonates with you, please consider helping us reach more Virginians with this important message.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85daa9/53d9897e/559c88df/1c881292/2573123563/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgwMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-drugcompanies-yt?refcode=20200920_f_1_nd__800__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**

Thank you for your support.

Team Warner

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85daa9/53d9897e/559c88df/1c881291/2573123563/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgwMCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-drugcompanies-yt?refcode=20200920_f_1_nd__800__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---
|
---

1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

| | | The polls still show that I'm in a dead heat with my opponent, and even CNN is calling this race one of the top 10 most likely to flip. My opponent and I certainly have different ideas on policy, from health care to our children's education, but we also approach politics very differently. While I reach out and listen to the people of Iowa, it's clear that my opponent will toe the party line. **[With about 16% of the voters still undecided, I need your help to finally break through this dead heat and spread my message across the district. Can I count on you to donate $20 or more right now?](https://act.myngp.com/el/C25J-nw_WMFSiL0LjuC80AWDI1KXnB_sCEKBVRTn9LU=/HMEPjqbFroqJNItXYgfPKtPM0QMxDxFK6FxWvutJDmU=?refcode=200920-email&amount=20)** With so much at stake, I can't afford to back down now. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, and we need to win it for the people of Iowa, despite the Washington money supporting my opponent. **[The people of Iowa need to know they have someone working for them, cutting through the"bull" in Washington. name: Sri Preston Kulkarni
subject: Can you donate $15?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
Friend,

Our campaign was recently featured in a video by Now This for our campaign’s unique ability to reach out to voters in the Houston community in 27 different languages. Take a look (and make a donation!) here >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nowthis2020?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.20_b2_S_all&amount=15

We’re breaking new barriers in the way campaigns are won -- and I’m proud to have you as part of this team. Our district is one of the most diverse districts in the entire country, and we’re putting in the work everyday to make sure that no voter is left behind between now and our election in 44 days.

We cannot win this election without your support, friend. And that’s why I’m asking for your help today. Can you chip in just $15 dollars to help us reach new voters?

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nowthis2020?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.20_b2_S_all&amount=15

Every voice in our district deserves to be heard, thank you for helping, friend.

-Sri

Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington.

DONATE ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.20_b2_S_all&amount=15

Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at https://sri2020.com/

Paid for by Sri for Congress

SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 [#]

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: Indiana is setting records again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Indiana is known for setting records - but this one might be the most meaningful one of them all. | |
---
| |
---|---|---
|

Friend,

Indiana is known for setting records – but this one might be the most meaningful of them all.

**As governor, Eric has been a leading pro-life advocate and today marks another amazing chapter in our fight for life.**

**Indiana officially leads the ENTIRE NATION in increasing the number of children adopted from foster care.**
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=12d517ba86734b8688488b732b518787&_e=vU9jQzAUIkU7nkpgAhS6Otd7VQkwvx-juD-hpzzVYGn2pyirmGtt-HamYlrQtoi-WgB7JFGqqr9Me9jNjpB6sEYB0suO-1k_JLXzy5Okow6U-s8AqhyXfs7Ba0N0dQYe0BY3epykMeNPb7bKwqjdOR3atKYIZqe7oxQisGXQee4CdT3RQ6HWH1_Z07mJXs8586w5VLru8tQKFU-jwV8U7Vm3gjqZKcjoECxvkfFIveAWp4FDl_CTT66KZdelap9JMD4Bo1iQACwRncACZTZAVpduypyXDILExBDDsjyZfWpLBEL6VHy9M9ivO9r7s-T9M2jDy0pVQSMJ_LAnUzlNkHbZagSqD_q-MTT6K_VN6pOVbUZvo0p38GMAHgCGU-ObfB3QU79FyihexC97MER_rVbfBQv5zpz4w5q3DcX-SWpFPeDvOrqpSdnBPNlALa46Vlk89XVHNLQZJ_UjGX-znpQ5xYVhl2b6kSVa0pI5DzI6RnPzFvg2YnzVvMgUN-sX)
[**Watch and Share**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=12d517ba86734b8688488b732b518787&_e=vU9jQzAUIkU7nkpgAhS6Otd7VQkwvx-juD-hpzzVYGn2pyirmGtt-HamYlrQtoi-WgB7JFGqqr9Me9jNjpB6sEYB0suO-1k_JLXzy5Okow6U-s8AqhyXfs7Ba0N0dQYe0BY3epykMeNPb7bKwqjdOR3atKYIZqe7oxQisGXQee4CdT3RQ6HWH1_Z07mJXs8586w5VLru8tQKFU-jwV8U7Vm3gjqZKcjoECxvkfFIveAWp4FDl_CTT66KZdelap9JMD4Bo1iQACwRncACZTZAVpduypyXDILExBDDsjyZfWoEP4cnF9Rb5BhzYowO4z1RYt63SvapPw0gHA54K0kWR-fUqJJjsYUDLEA_Xp2HqjMBoP6tDmQBdbYTw3SSZuXX4O6B-sFfk1kbrSDi4eDV10F3JgMfMKlGXSD1vbPfqWn2VpTutbtFg9ccit76W1udjYCzazWRSUubn-HRqzZXxhK0303RbiHCf4SwBfpBP35Ga-T9VvA8Yr5f4xWNn5sh)
_Since 2019, 2,489 Hoosier children have been adopted through the Indiana Department of Child Services (DCS). That means 2,489 children will finally have loving, permanent families and access to life-changing opportunities thanks to Governor Holcomb’s leadership._

Setting a national record like this doesn’t just happen – it takes intentional action and a commitment from top leaders.

**Thankfully, Governor Holcomb is leading the charge. He made increasing adoptions a key priority in his Next Level Agenda by:**
* **Creating adoption units within DCS**
* **Providing more resources to assist in the adoption process**
* **More than doubling the number of adoption consultants from 7 to 19 to ensure families and children find the right match**
* **Launching an enhanced database that allows quicker processing of adoption inquiries**
* **Identifying and removing internal barriers through the Adoption Rapid Permanency Review**

**Indiana’s record-breaking year for adoptions caught President Trump’s attention. The administration rewarded Eric’s efforts with $4.7 million to continue to enhance our adoption system and ultimately place more children into loving homes.**

[**Share on Twitter**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=12d517ba86734b8688488b732b518787&_e=vU9jQzAUIkU7nkpgAhS6Oi6kQe0mKKAxyu-qnGNoANTsa0Lz90T2LixkcRIin5zDDU0GlApGe0sOJLo_V7eMi627C4Gyq27KFvgkTBPcI8zm3Jha-3dRPy6AOyf5at1J0m_LOlK-qy0jOZtHVJt-SdsnwzbO_zWakkBg0ui_2WGm0-7iri3mJsjDvk_PMtPdnHQcLzVMIeRgcC7NKj1_xyolxhu0Ivv5Cg1EJj-6NVOJENdl5JBfcE-GkBqoBs-qc1TqzJQf7hL1677LaKXQEE9NeWOl0GDrAaBmU6d-xE-hUbhfwghcO6g4hVDTxcyECqbe8mBDZHheA46DUR0yro02GTjpC1XnSI_9IUfcqgyEo95lYzfCBR8YJHKeNYMt6m-OhAQnlDzWUJWnHSQTkgGgajJso_8LCZ5laGsYNbxWSci86P3vUwfDYlnsGuZeEkRHtmZQfP_DOHR4PjutjBH0-y780qGK6rrSPsvl2ElMIRw0xQce2ldiAC4806c3)

name: Ethan Gruber
subject: Hear from an expert on potential covid vaccines
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
Hello Peter,
I hope you had a chance to check out the invitation for our upcoming event with Doctors Organized for Healthcare Solutions. It's more important than ever that we ensure quality healthcare for everyone. Especially considering Trump's recent statement that we'll have a vaccine in October, I look forward to hearing Dr. Lederman's expertise & insight into vaccines for COVID-19. We'd love to have you join us.
You can click the links below to RSVP, or simply respond to this e-mail.
Stay well and thanks for your support

Sincerely,
Ethan Gruber
Campaign Manager
* * *
|
---
Peter, The members of Doctors Organized for Healthcare Solutions know first-hand the importance of this election and how healthcare will move forward. That's why I hope you will join them for a virtual fundraiser in support of Betsy Rader for State Senate! Betsy will be speaking with Dr. Lederman, an infectious disease expert, about: COVID-19; vaccine progress; and more. Details and tickets below. name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani?=
subject: Yes to Fairness
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2b3e0c2315a8/yes-to-fairness?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| | Friends -- This campaign is lucky to have grassroots supporters all across the country.

But here in Illinois, we have some challenges to contend with. We’ve become known for laughable corruption and a years-long budget crisis that has led to drastic cuts in services to our most vulnerable communities.

**This year, we have a chance at fixing it:[ ](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=04ff0afff1&e=140a9b81e7)[the Fair Tax initiative](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=f86a9d8705&e=140a9b81e7)[ ](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=655725adf7&e=140a9b81e7)finally asks the wealthy to pay their fair share. **Illinois is one of only a handful of states with a flat tax, and that flat tax has hurt our economic prospects for decades. This year, we change it.

And having Fair Tax on the ballot is going to lift up candidates like me -- when Illinois voters cast their ballots, they’re going to be considering what kind of economic structure they’re voting for -- and what kind of candidates they can trust to fight for fairness.

**Can you[chip in $10 today](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=b70f5955df&e=140a9b81e7) to help us communicate our message of fairness to every voter in this district? **

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16
---
| [Donate today](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=9d87d73583&e=140a9b81e7 "Donate today")

clean_body: | | | | | | | Friends -- This campaign is lucky to have grassroots supporters all across the country. But here in Illinois, we have some challenges to contend with. We’ve become known for laughable corruption and a years-long budget crisis that has led to drastic cuts in services to our most vulnerable communities. This year, we have a chance at fixing it: asks the wealthy to pay their fair share. Illinois is one of only a handful of states with a flat tax, and that flat tax has hurt our economic prospects for decades. This year, we change it. And having Fair Tax on the ballot is going to lift up candidates like me -- when Illinois voters cast their ballots, they’re going to be considering what kind of economic structure they’re voting for -- and what kind of candidates they can trust to fight for fairness. Can you to help us communicate our message of fairness to every voter in this district? Dani Brzozowski Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16 | "Donate today" | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 Dani for Illinois, All rights reserved.

body:

Cornyn just two minutes to fall in line behind Mitch McConnell and his Washington bosses. | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f2b/7f51f7bc/45e8c089/4efa780e/1215992511/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxNTYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-supremecourt?refcode=email_20200920.3nd__2156__&amount=10")
---
Two minutes to abandon everything he said in 2016 about how in an election year, the American people should have a voice in the decision about a lifetime appointment to the Supreme Court.

Two minutes to decide that less than 50 days before the election was enough for another utterly craven political maneuver, no matter how hypocritical.

**It 's spineless, Peter, even for John Cornyn.** He threw all "principles" aside and did what Mitch McConnell told him to do.

We need a senator who thinks for herself -- who will put our country, and our people, over politics to do what's right. We need to elect MJ. **Will you pitch in today to elect a badass who will put Texans first?**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Pat=20Hackett?=
subject: Watch: Pat speaks on Legacy of RBG
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
Watch Pat's speech on the steps of the St. Joseph County Courthouse in honor of Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg. | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=0318c60828&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | Dear Friend,

Last night, I stood among dozens of members of our community as we gathered at the St. Joseph County Courthouse to honor the life and memory of Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg.

We gathered not simply to mourn the loss of a glorious jurist and woman, but we gathered in fidelity to her fierce devotion to justice.

I had the privilege of standing on the steps of the courthouse, in front of Lady Justice, to say a few words in honor of Justice Ginsburg.

_You can see that speech by clicking the button below._
---
| [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=faa16cb4cf&e=5886ca081d)
---
| Ruth Bader Ginsburg was a light to this nation and a beacon of justice for all of us. She is a symbol of hope for all of those in this nation still denied justice.

Much will be required of us before and after November 3rd. We must all act, as Justice Ginsburg did, to ensure the words spelled out above the entrance to the Supreme Court, “Equal Justice Under Law,“ will be fulfilled, and work with courage towards that more perfect union.

Pat
---
|
---
| | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=f905dcdbd6&e=5886ca081d)

subject: URGENT: Protect the Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc518/2a380d31/20e8dc4f/f0bd8e/2541699751/VEsH/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc518/2a380d31/20e8dc4f/f0bd8e/2541699751/VEsE/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Team --
Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump are _giddy_ about rushing a Supreme Court nominee to fill Justice Ginsburg's seat.
The hypocrisy is appalling. In 2016, when a vacancy opened in February of an election year, they refused to consider Judge Garland, President Obama's nominee.
Now, with the election already underway and voters casting their ballots in many states, they're promising to nominate and confirm a new justice -- all so they can undo the Affordable Care Act and overturn _Roe v. Wade_.
We ALL have to make our voices heard loud and clear, and do everything we can to stop it. [**It 's time for all hands on deck -- please sign our emergency petition to tell Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell no Supreme Court nomination before the next President is sworn in.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc518/2a380d31/20e8dc4f/f0bd8f/2541699751/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/2020_SaveSCOTUS?source=e20200920_SCOTUS_na&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
The future of the Supreme Court and our rights as we know them are on the line, so please don't wait.
Thank you for getting involved.

[Contribute](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc518/2a380d31/20e8dc4f/f0bd88/2541699751/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDIwMDkyMF9TQ09UVVNfbmEiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiMywyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20200920_SCOTUS_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")
